title: wedelia frustrata
intro: Wedelia frustrata, also known as the wedelia or creeping oxeye daisy, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of wedelia frustrata include treating fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and easily accessible herbal remedy.
